_comment: Ground truth PLACEHOLDER for the DFRWS 2011 Forensic Challenge (Android).
Tier: RED (not ready, do not rely) — evidence currently lives on a personal
Dropbox (can vanish) and needs mirroring + recompute. TRAP: the README hashes are
labeled MD5 but are actually SHA1 — do NOT chase a phantom mismatch; recompute and
pin both MD5 and SHA256 when a clean local copy exists.
Verdict is UNKNOWN and recall target is low on purpose: this golden is a stub to
reserve the case id and record the SHA1-mislabel trap. Replace the findings with
the real answer key after a verified mirror + manual walkthrough.
license: DFRWS Forensic Challenge — public for research/education
